headline: Trump's WH BALLROOM BUNKER 🏰🍆 RESUMES - Judge BTFO'd 💥👨‍⚖️
text:
🚨 BREAKING: Appeals Court SLAPS DOWN 👋 Judge Leon's 🚫 BLOCKADE, GREENLIGHTS 🟢 Trump's THICC $400M WHITE HOUSE BALLROOM 🏰💃🍑 - underground BUNKER 🕳️💣 + aboveground PARTY PAD 🥳📈 resuming FULL THROTTLE ⏰💨 until June 5th hearing! 😤🔥 Trump admin APPEALED 🆙 like a boss after Leon's Thursday L 🐀, claiming NATSEC 🛡️ imperative - no more HALF-ASSED hole next to Executive Mansion 🏠😩!

Judge Leon 🤡💼 cried 'CONGRESSIONAL APPROVAL NEEDED 📜🚫!' and called natsec reclass a SNEAKY WORKAROUND 🐍😂 - 'Natsec ain't a BLANK CHEQUE 💸 for ILLEGAL VIBES!' But appeals court said HOLD MY MAGA HAT 🧢🇺🇸, ordered him to RECONSIDER 🧐💭 after March TEMP BLOCK 🚫⏳. VICTORY DANCE 💃🕺 for Donnie T, REDESIGNING 🛠️ America's STORIED CASTLE 🏰👑!

Trump TRUTH SOCIAL RANT GOES VIRAL 📱🔥: 'Crooked Judge tryna STOP FUTURE PREZ + WORLD LEADERS from SAFE MEGAPARTY SPOT 🥂🌍!' It's ONE BIG EXPENSIVE COMPLEX 🤑💎 - BOMB SHELTERS 🧨🛡️, MED BAYS 🏥🚑, VITAL for MIL OPS 🇺🇸💪! 'NEEDED NOW ⏰🚨 - NO JUDGE STOPS THIS!' Justice Dept PILED ON 🥊: 'Imperils POTUS + leaves GIANT HOLE 😱🕳️!' BBC simping for comment 📞🤐.

DEETS: Nat Trust Preservation KARENS 👵🚫 sued last year over NO PLAN FILING 📋❌ with Capital Planning Commish + Congress ghosted 🙅‍♂️. East Wing DEMOLISHED 🧨💥 in Oct 1902 relic GONE for 1,350-GUEST BALLROOM BEAST 🥳👯‍♂️ - PRIVATE DONORS footing $400M bill 💰🙌 NO TAXPAYER CUCKING 🤑!

Trump channeling ELON VIBES 🚀🐸: Building MAR-A-LAGO EAST 🏖️🍆 with bunker glow-up 💣✨! Libs MELTING DOWN 😱💦 over 'HISTORIC DESECRATION' but MAGA says 'PARTY ON WAYNE 🥳🎉!' Judge Leon LAWYERING HARD but APPEALS COURT YEETED his ruling 🗑️🚀 - Trump's got that GOLDEN TOWER ENERGY 🗽🍑 turning WH into ULTIMATE RAVE CAVE 🕺🔊! Future summits? BALLROOM BANGERS 💥🥂 with world leaders DANCING 🔥👑 - no more CRAMPED BASEMENT VIBES 🕳️😩. Donnie dropping BOMBS 💣📢: 'VITAL UNIT for AMERICA FIRST 🦅🇺🇸!' Who's simping now, haters? 🤡💸
